name: regimpact-ai-demo-video
description: Programmatic ~105s silent product demo video for RegImpact AI, generated from code via Remotion. No spoken narration by design — the story is told through motion typography and (optionally) an ambient music bed. Isolated from the main Next.js app (separate bundler, separate React copy) — see README.md for how to regenerate after UI changes or drop in a music file.
